reviews.comment:
Hice llenar el tanque de una camioneta, varias veces, y nunca me pueden cargar los puntos de la serviclub. La última vez me dieron un papelito escrito y cuando volví con el papelito no me lo reconocieron. Alguien ahí adentro se está sumando esos puntos en su Serviclub.

(Translated by Google)
I've had my truck's tank filled several times, and they've never been able to credit my Serviclub points. The last time they gave me a slip of paper, but when I went back with it, they wouldn't recognize it. Someone in there is adding those points to their Serviclub account.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4aVBlNldnEAE

reviews.comment:
La gente te atiende bien, podes inflar aire sin cargo, cargar NAFTA, tenés accesos saliendo y entrando a la autopista o sin entrar, pero está en eterna reforma y por lo tanto no está la sección de kiosco ni repuestos

(Translated by Google)
The people serve you well, you can inflate air free of charge, fill up with gasoline, you have access to the highway exiting and entering or without entering, but it is under constant renovation and therefore there is no kiosk or spare parts section.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4OWRyOXVBRRAB
